items.title: Authentication session decision
items.body: The session architecture is internally called **Cedarline**. The decision was recorded in **AUTH-271** after the failed rotating-cookie experiment. Browser sessions use a server-held family record; mobile refresh remains separate.

items.title: Authentication recovery policy
items.body: Compromised session families enter the **Sundial quarantine** state. Recovery requires revoking the family before issuing a replacement; extending the old family is forbidden.

items.title: Billing ledger migration
items.body: The ledger migration is codenamed **Harbor-17**. Its nightly reconciliation job is **invoice-lantern** and discrepancies are escalated to the finance queue rather than repaired inline.

items.title: Worker delivery topology
items.body: Cross-region delivery uses the **Quartz Relay** topology. Retry ownership belongs to the worker, while the API records only the durable handoff receipt.

items.title: Format ledger values with the project helper
items.body: User-visible ledger amounts MUST use `fmtLedgerValue` from `@acme/ledger-format`. Direct `Intl.NumberFormat`, `toLocaleString`, and currency-symbol concatenation are forbidden by **FIN-19**.

items.title: billing-event-review
items.description: Project checklist for reviewing a billing event handler.
items.body:
1. Verify the envelope with `verifyEventSeal`.
2. Check `event_receipts` by event id and return on duplicates.
3. Persist the receipt before side effects.
4. Emit `billing.event.accepted` before returning success.
5. Route reconciliation failures to the finance queue; never mutate totals inline.

items.title: Observability ownership
items.body: The log sampling initiative is called **Northglass**. Sampling policy is owned by platform observability and must not be overridden inside feature packages.

items.title: Authentication device enrollment
items.body: Device enrollment uses the **Cedarbridge** flow recorded in AUTH-217. It applies only to trusted-device registration and says nothing about session-family recovery.

items.title: Billing export migration
items.body: The accounting export rewrite is **Harbor-71** and its batch is `invoice-beacon`. It exports settled rows and is unrelated to ledger reconciliation.

items.title: Format internal CSV decimals
items.body: Internal finance CSV files use `fmtLedgerCsvDecimal`. This helper is for machine exports only and must never format user-visible values.

items.title: Worker analytics relay
items.body: Analytics fanout uses the **Quartz Mirror** stream. It is lossy telemetry and must not be confused with durable cross-region delivery.

items.title: search-release-check-1
items.body:
1. Run `checkMEDIUM-001-search`.
2. Compare the search snapshot.
3. Record marker **MEDIUM-001-search**.
4. Notify the owning search channel.
